title: The Fed is not in control of the yield curve. No one is.
section_path: The Fed is not in control of the yield curve. No one is.
section_path_text: The Fed is not in control of the yield curve. No one is.
summary:
The Fed is not in control of the yield curve. By George Lagarias
The three things I would tell my clients this morning:
US Debt is rising and the Fed is not buying any more. Additionally, geopolitics threaten to destabilise inflation again.
